Bobby (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,242,801Details
International Box Office $9,355,005
Worldwide Box Office $20,597,806
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,052,914
Total $13,052,914
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$69,039 (0.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$14,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2 opening theaters/1,670 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,398,980

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 17th, 2006 (Limited) by MGM
November 23rd, 2006 (Expands Wide) by MGM
Video Release: April 10th, 2007 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: R for language, drug content, and a scene of violence (to be appealed)
Running Time: 116 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Epilogue, One Day
Plot point: Political Assassination
Subgenre: Historical Drama
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Spanish
